news_title: Ten-League International Holdings Limited Reports Unaudited Financial Results for the First Six Months of Fiscal Year 2025
summary: Ten-League International Holdings (NASDAQ: TLIH), a Singapore-based provider of turnkey project solutions, reported strong financial results for H1 2025. Revenue increased21.6% to S$37.7 million(US$29.6 million), driven by rising demand for heavy equipment linked to major infrastructure projects. The company achieved significant improvements in profitability withgross profit surging 67.7% to S$8.9 millionand gross margin expanding to 23.5%.Net income showed remarkable growth,increasing 268.9% to S$2.4 million(US$1.9 million), while earnings per share rose to S$0.09. The company's cash position strengthened toS$5.2 millionfollowing its successful Nasdaq IPO, with operating cash flow reaching S$10.0 million.
